message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Remove Bag Effect

participant "Virologist" as V
participant "Bag" as B

V -> B : 1 removeEffect(virologist)
activate B
B -> B : 2 getExtraInventorSize()
activate B
B --> B : 3 extraInventorSize
deactivate B
B -> V : 4 getInventorSize()
activate V
V --> B : 5 inventorSize
deactivate V
note over V, B #LightYellow : **Decreas** the inventor size by the **bag's extra inventor size**
B -> V : 6 setInventorySize(inventorSize – extraInventorSize)
activate V
V --> B : 7
deactivate V
B --> V : 8
deactivate B
@enduml
```
